block_00: Card chhaviyan asvikrit kar dee gayi
block_01: Durbhaagy se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi debit/credit card ki chhaviyan asvikrt kar di gayen kyonki card ka agle bhag ki chhavi pradaan nahi ki gai thi.
block_02: Hum anurodh karte hain ki aap nimn link ke maadhyam se apne card ke donon side sahit naye card chhaviyaan upload karen.
block_04: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki saraahana karte hain.
block_07: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
